HarmonicConstituents.name: M2
HarmonicConstituents.comments: Used 6-month LSQHA, excluding use of 1997 data which had strong river flow masking tides; deleted Mf, Msf, MM constituents; and substituted Ssa from NWLON at Port Chicago which has similar seasonal river response (Sa is unstable from year to year).
